summary: Frontend testing of Premium BBQ Builder component. All 11 BBQ products load correctly with proper pricing. Multi-meat selection, grade changes (Prime/Wagyu/Grass Fed), dry-aged options, quantity inputs, and dynamic price calculations all working correctly. Stripe checkout integration successful - redirects to Stripe payment page. Admin BBQ Products Manager accessible with full CRUD capabilities.

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on interactive elements (checkboxes, dropdowns, buttons) - recommended for automated testing

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to PremiumBBQBuilder component for better testability (optional enhancement)
critical_code_review_comments: Pricing calculation is correct: basePrice + gradeUpcharge + dryAgedUpcharge * quantity
All 11 BBQ products display with correct base prices and upcharges
Grade dropdown shows 3 options: Prime, American Wagyu (+$25/lb), Grass Fed (+$8/lb)
Aging days selector shows 4 options: 21, 28, 35, 45 Days (Premium)
Stripe checkout creates session and redirects properly
Admin BBQ Products Manager shows all 11 products with Edit/Delete functionality
CSS styling is professional with gold gradient theme and responsive design
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing 11 BBQ products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium BBQ Builder fully functional. 11 products: Filet Mignon ($48), Ribeye ($42), NY Strip ($38), Porterhouse ($45), T-Bone ($40), Tomahawk ($65), Flank Steak ($28), Beef Short Ribs ($32), Beef Ribs ($35), Picanha ($36), Pork Ribs ($24). Grade upcharges vary per product. Stripe checkout working in sandbox mode.

details: 11 BBQ product cards load correctly
Checkbox selection toggles product options panel
Grade dropdown: Prime, American Wagyu (+$25/lb), Grass Fed (+$8/lb)
Quantity input (pounds) works correctly
Dry Aged checkbox adds +$15/lb upcharge
Aging Days selector: 21, 28, 35, 45 Days (Premium)
Item Total calculates correctly per product
Summary card shows Selected Meats count and Total price
Multi-meat selection updates total correctly
Filet Mignon Prime 1lb: $48.00 ✓
Filet Mignon Wagyu 1lb: $73.00 ($48 + $25) ✓
Filet Mignon Wagyu + Dry Aged 1lb: $88.00 ($48 + $25 + $15) ✓
Filet Mignon Wagyu + Dry Aged 3lbs: $264.00 ($88 * 3) ✓
Checkout button disabled when no meats selected
Checkout button enabled when meats selected
Creates Stripe checkout session successfully
Redirects to checkout.stripe.com with correct amount
Shows 'Master Meat Box sandbox' merchant name
Admin login with admin@mastersmeathaus.com works
BBQ Meats tab accessible in Admin Dashboard
Shows all 11 BBQ products with details
Each product has Edit and Delete buttons
+ Add BBQ Product button present
Product details show: Base Price, Wagyu Upcharge, Grass Fed Upcharge, Dry Aged Upcharge, Ranch, Grade

frontend: Dry Aged checkbox upcharge applied - PASSED
